01005.name: Wendy Adams
01005.text:
[reaction] When you reveal a chaos token, choose and discard 1 card from your hand: Cancel that chaos token and return it to the bag. Reveal a new chaos token. (Limit once per test/ability.)
[elder_sign] effect: +0. If Wendy's Amulet is in play, you automatically succeed instead.

01044.name: Switchblade
01044.text: Fast. [action]: Fight. If you succeed by 2 or more, this attack deals +1 damage.

01050.name: Elusive
01050.text:
Fast. Play only during your turn.
Disengage from each enemy engaged with you and move to a revealed location with no enemies.

01051.name: Backstab
01051.text: Fight. This attack uses [agility] instead of [combat]. This attack deals +2 damage.

01052.name: Sneak Attack
01052.text: Deal 2 damage to an exhausted enemy at your location.

01073.name: Scavenging
01073.text: [reaction] After you successfully investigate by 2 or more, exhaust Scavenging: Choose an [[Item]] card in your discard pile and add it to your hand.

01078.name: Cunning Distraction
01078.text: Evade. Automatically evade all enemies at your location.

01079.name: "Look what I found!"
01079.text:
Fast. Play after you fail a skill test by 2 or less while investigating.
Discover 2 clues in your location.

01080.name: Lucky!
01080.text:
Fast. Play when you would fail a skill test.
Get +2 to your skill value for that test.

01090.name: Perception
01090.text:
Max 1 committed per skill test.
If this test is successful, draw 1 card.

01096.name: Amnesia
01096.text: Revelation - Choose and discard all but 1 card from your hand.

01144.name: The Ritual Begins
01144.text: Each enemy gets +1 fight and +1 evade.

01145.name: Vengeance Awaits
01145.text: Forced - When this agenda advances: - If the investigators are at Act 1, put the set-aside Ritual Site into play and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there. - If the investigators are at Act 2 or 3, discard all enemies at the Ritual Site and spawn the set-aside Umôrdhoth there.

01149.name: Main Path
01149.text: The Main Path is connected to each other [[Woods]] location. [action]: Resign. "There's nothing we can do to stop them!" You flee from the woods, leaving Arkham to its grisly fate.

01152.name: Arkham Woods
01152.text: This location is investigated using [willpower] instead of the skill indicated by the investigation attempt.

01155.name: Arkham Woods
01155.text: [action]: Heal 1 damage or heal 1 horror. (Limit once per turn.)

01158.name: Umôrdhoth's Wrath
01158.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (5). For each point you fail by, you must either (choose one): Choose and discard a card from your hand, or take 1 damage and 1 horror.

01165.name: Dissonant Voices
01165.text: Revelation - Put Dissonant Voices into play in your threat area. You cannot play assets or events. Forced - At the end of the round: Discard Dissonant Voices.

01166.name: Ancient Evils
01166.text: Revelation - Place 1 doom on the current agenda. This effect can cause the current agenda to advance.

01177.name: Yithian Observer
01177.text: Prey - Fewest cards in hand. Forced - When Yithian Observer attacks you: Discard 1 card at random from your hand. If you cannot, Yithian Observer deals +1 damage and +1 horror for this attack.

50033.name: Arkham Woods
50033.text: Forced - After an investigator at this location succeeds at a skill test on a treachery: That treachery gains surge. (Group limit once per round.)

50035.name: Arkham Woods
50035.text: Each enemy at this location cannot take more than 1 damage from each attack performed against it.

50040.name: Chill from Below
50040.text: Revelation - Test [willpower] (3). For each point you fail by, you must discard 1 card at random from your hand. For each card you cannot discard, take 1 damage.

50041.name: Disciple of the Devourer
50041.text:
Spawn - Farthest empty location.
Forced - After you spawn Disciple of the Devourer: You must either place 1 doom on it or place 1 of your clues on its location. If the current agenda is not agenda 1, do both instead.

50043.name: Mask of Umôrdhoth
50043.text:
Revelation - Attach to the farthest [[Cultist]] enemy and place 1 doom on that enemy. If there are no [[Cultist]] enemies in play, search the encounter deck and discard pile for a [[Cultist]] enemy, draw it, and attach Mask of Umôrdhoth to it. Shuffle the encounter deck.
Attached enemy gets +2 health. If attached enemy is unique, it gains retaliate. If it is non-unique, it gains aloof instead.
